first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. Minor differences in wording, such as specifying which technologies are less relevant or rephrasing a strength, fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate. There is no language in the variant that keys off the location change.
